title: amerimnon sympatheticum
side_effects: Amerimnon sympatheticum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and vomiting, especially when taken in large doses. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to stomach ulcers and intestinal irritation, resulting in abdominal pain and diarrhea. In some cases, improper use of Amerimnon sympatheticum can cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. If left untreated, these side effects can worsen and lead to more severe health complications.
